content.full_text:
December 11, 1984

Vance W. Raye  
Legal Affairs Secretary  
Governor's Office  
State Capitol  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: A-84-304

Dear Vance:

This is to confirm my advice that AB 2992, enacted in 1984, does not make Government Code Section 84308 applicable to members of the Governor's personal staff. The amendments in AB 2992 were not intended to change Section 84308 in this respect. Section 84308, as interpreted by our proposed 2 Cal. Adm. Code Section 18438.1, applies only to members of boards and commissions and to agency heads and department directors. Since the Governor's personal staff members are neither members of any board or commission nor heads of any agency, we do not feel it is necessary to include an express reference to them in 18438.1.

Please let me know if you have any comments on any of our proposed regulations.

Very truly yours,

Barbara A. Milman  
General Counsel
